meta_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Solve stuck with basic apps
content.seo_description: Overcome stuck with basic apps using this intermediate Git with AI checklist. Master Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster and impress your clients.
content.answer_block: Stop manually managing version control and code architecture. By integrating Git workflows with AI agents like Claude Code and Antigravity, you automate branch management, PR generation, and complex refactoring. This shift transforms your development from manual labor to high-leverage architectural orchestration, allowing you to ship professional-grade SaaS features in record time.
content.intro:
The screen flickers, the cursor blinks, and you’re trapped in a cycle of boilerplate code. You’re shipping, but the apps lack the structural integrity to scale, and every feature request feels like a battle against your own technical debt. It’s the classic freelancer’s ceiling: you're fast, but you aren't building anything that truly lasts.

It is time to stop treating Git as a file-storage system and start using it as an AI-driven engine. By weaving autonomous agents directly into your version control, you move from writing code to engineering systems. This checklist is your blueprint for escaping the 'basic app' trap and delivering enterprise-ready SaaS products with the precision of a lead architect.

steps.title: Contextualize Your Repo with AI Metadata
steps.description: Before the AI can help, it needs to understand your project's architectural constraints. We use Antigravity to generate a comprehensive context map of your repository structure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this codebase and generate a high-level architectural summary, including key dependencies and data flow patterns, for use in future prompts.
steps.claude_code_command: claude read . --context 'Analyze the repo structure and identify potential bottlenecks for scaling'

steps.title: Automated Branching Strategy
steps.description: Stop guessing branch names. Use AI to enforce clean, feature-based branching that maps directly to your client's Jira or Trello tickets.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a new branch name based on the current feature requirements and ensure the naming convention follows conventional commits (feat/fix/chore).
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a new feature branch for the user authentication module using standard naming conventions'

steps.title: AI-Driven Code Refactoring
steps.description: Move beyond basic bug fixes. Use Claude Code to refactor existing, stagnant modules into scalable components that impress clients.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this module to implement the repository pattern, ensuring loose coupling and better testability.
steps.claude_code_command: claude apply 'Refactor the AuthController to use dependency injection and separate the logic into service classes'

steps.title: Intelligent Commit Generation
steps.description: Never write a vague commit message again. Generate semantic, professional commit logs that explain the 'why' behind every line of code change.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Summarize these changes into a semantic commit message that describes the technical impact of the refactor.

steps.title: Automated Pull Request Documentation
steps.description: Your clients judge you by your documentation. Use AI to generate comprehensive PR descriptions that detail the changes and testing steps.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a professional pull request description for this feature, including a summary of changes, testing steps, and potential side effects.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Draft a PR summary for the current branch that highlights performance improvements'

pro_tips: Use a .claudeignore file to prevent the AI from indexing massive node_modules or build directories, keeping token usage efficient.
Always run a 'dry-run' command before applying large refactors to ensure the AI doesn't hallucinate structural changes to your framework.
Leverage Git hooks to trigger Claude Code analysis automatically every time you attempt a commit, ensuring code quality before it hits the server.
Store your best Antigravity prompts in a shared 'prompts.json' file within your repo so your entire team uses the same logic patterns.
Use AI to write your unit tests concurrently with your code; if the test fails, feed the error back into Claude Code for an immediate, automated fix.
resources: Git Best Practices for Freelancers: https://git-scm.com/doc
content.next_steps: Configure your local environment with these CLI tools, pick one non-critical project to practice the workflow, and then integrate the AI-branching strategy into your next client sprint.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools to stop building basic apps and start engineering professional SaaS solutions that command higher rates and provide real value. Stop wasting time on repetitive tasks and start focusing on high-level architecture. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
